title: Freeze Create
body:
# Freeze Create

Need Create mod!

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/wh6W07wIaIA" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## Summary

This is a mod that works with a refrigerator using Create's Encase Fan.


## Feature

### Freezer Mehchanic
(Use Encase Fan and Ice to prevent cold air from escaping. once complete, you can Preserves food so it doesn't spoil)

### Rotten Mechanic
This mod adds the ability for food to rot(Rotten Time is configuable)

 

## Credit

Thanks for Air Filled Code!

Ad-Astra: https://github.com/terrarium-earth/Ad-Astra
